title: Adventurous Protein Pot
description: A fresh, tender Moroccan dish featuring lamb shanks for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Cut lamb shanks into bite-sized pieces and season with salt.
In a large pot, sauté onions and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
Add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and paprika. Cook for about 30 seconds.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice and tomato paste. Stir well to combine.
Place lamb shanks in the pot along with pomegranate molasses. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Simmer gently for 15 minutes, then transfer the pot to an oven-proof dish (baking sheet).
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-30 minutes until lamb is tender and golden brown on top.
Serve hot as a main course with couscous or a side salad.
